raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should 'Check this' mean a technical research-validity check focused on logic and evidence, or a writing-focused check focused on clarity and polish?","rationale":{"R1.2":"A broad request to check a research artifact centrally includes verifying whether the algorithmic and argumentative claims cohere logically.","R1.3":"The artifact reports convergence and performance claims, so checking whether those claims are aligned with the stated evidence is centrally implicated.","R1.6":"Because the delegation is unspecific, a normal interpretation of checking a draft includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, grammar, and concision.","RX.1":"Uncertainty must be disclosed because the terse delegation leaves the intended kind of checking underspecified.","RX.2":"The projection must guard against assigning responsibilities such as full validation or novelty proof beyond what the delegation clearly requests.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is load-bearing because the agent must only project responsibilities and not perform the requested check on the artifact.","RX.4":"Downstream harm avoidance is active because an unchecked research projection could otherwise encourage unsupported methodological or empirical claims.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability are required so the assigned responsibilities remain tied to the delegation and the provided artifact rather than external assumptions."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should 'Check this' mean a technical research-validity check focused on logic and evidence, or a writing-focused check focused on clarity and polish?

rationale.R1.2: A broad request to check a research artifact centrally includes verifying whether the algorithmic and argumentative claims cohere logically.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact reports convergence and performance claims, so checking whether those claims are aligned with the stated evidence is centrally implicated.
rationale.R1.6: Because the delegation is unspecific, a normal interpretation of checking a draft includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, grammar, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty must be disclosed because the terse delegation leaves the intended kind of checking underspecified.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must guard against assigning responsibilities such as full validation or novelty proof beyond what the delegation clearly requests.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is load-bearing because the agent must only project responsibilities and not perform the requested check on the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream harm avoidance is active because an unchecked research projection could otherwise encourage unsupported methodological or empirical claims.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are required so the assigned responsibilities remain tied to the delegation and the provided artifact rather than external assumptions.
